{{CargoRelic
|name=Erasmo of Narni
|class_id=22545
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=05-16
|source=
|description=On May 16, 1450 AD, the Erasmo of Narni was placed in front of a church in Padua.<br>This sculpture is the work of Donatello, the first master sculptor of the Renaissance. At that time, the Venetian Republic commissioned this master to create a sculpture to commemorate the achievements of Gatamelata. The sculptor created a life-size figure that is in complete harmony with the large and heavy horse beneath, conveying a sense of full power that not only impressed people but also became the object of imitation by future sculptors.
|fame=31
|art=71
|fth=45
|civ=52
|tech=44
|ss1=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per 2,000 Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +24<br>Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss2=Snail RUSH +40<br>Per 2,000 Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss3=Snail RUSH +50<br>Per 2,000 Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +40<br>Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss4=Snail RUSH +70<br>Per 2,000 Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +56<br>Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss5=Snail RUSH +90<br>Per 2,000 Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000
|ss7=Snail RUSH +90<br>Per 2,000 Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Prairie Sanctum Rating Pts: 100000/100000<br>Snail RUSH +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Prairiesanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Prairie Sanctum: Prairie Sanctum, Glorium Output +15%
|skill2=[[File:Prairiesanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Prairie Sanctum: This Relic's ART +10
}}
